languages.text: Зал заполнен бессчетными левитирующими диорамами. Единственный способ перемещаться между ними — антигравитационные транспортные плиты.
The hall is filled with countless floating dioramas. The only way to move between them is by using the anti-gravity transport slabs.
languages.original_text: Зал заполнен бессчетными левитирующими диорамами. Единственный способ перемещаться между ними — антигравитационные транспортные плиты.

traits.locale_text: The hall is filled with countless floating dioramas. The only way to move between them is by using the anti-gravity transport slabs.
The hall is filled with countless floating dioramas. The only way to move between them is by using the anti-gravity transport slabs.
The hall is filled with countless floating dioramas. The only way to move between them is by using the anti-gravity transport slabs.
The hall is filled with countless floating dioramas. The only way to move between them is by using the anti-gravity transport slabs.

languages.text: In der Halle gibt es zahllose schwebende Dioramen. Der einzige Weg, sich zwischen ihnen zu bewegen, sind die schwebenden Transportplattformen.
languages.original_text: The hall is filled with countless floating dioramas. The only way to move between them is by using the anti-gravity transport slabs.

traits.locale_text: In der Halle gibt es zahllose schwebende Dioramen. Der einzige Weg, sich zwischen ihnen zu bewegen, sind die schwebenden Transportplattformen.

languages.text: Le hall est peuplé d'innombrables dioramas flottants. La seule façon de passer de l'un à l'autre est d'utiliser les dalles de transport antigravité.
languages.original_text: The hall is filled with countless floating dioramas. The only way to move between them is by using the anti-gravity transport slabs.

traits.locale_text: Le hall est peuplé d'innombrables dioramas flottants. La seule façon de passer de l'un à l'autre est d'utiliser les dalles de transport antigravité.

languages.text: 大厅里漂浮着无数实景模型。想在它们之间穿行，只能依靠那些反重力运输平台。
languages.original_text: The hall is filled with countless floating dioramas. The only way to move between them is by using the anti-gravity transport slabs.

traits.locale_text: 大厅里漂浮着无数实景模型。想在它们之间穿行，只能依靠那些反重力运输平台。

languages.text: La sala está llena de dioramas flotantes. La única forma de llegar a ellos es mediante las losas antigravedad de transporte.
languages.original_text: The hall is filled with countless floating dioramas. The only way to move between them is by using the anti-gravity transport slabs.

traits.locale_text: La sala está llena de dioramas flotantes. La única forma de llegar a ellos es mediante las losas antigravedad de transporte.

languages.text: ホールは無数の浮遊ジオラマで埋め尽くされている。その間を移動するには反重力輸送板を使うしかない。
languages.original_text: The hall is filled with countless levitating dioramas. The only way to move between them is with antigravity transport plates.

languages.text: Salon, sayısız yüzen diyorama ile dolu. Aralarında hareket etmenin tek yolu, yer çekimi karşıtı nakliye tabakalarını kullanmak.
languages.original_text: The hall is filled with countless floating dioramas. The only way to move between them is by using the anti-gravity transport slabs.

traits.locale_text: Salon, sayısız yüzen diyorama ile dolu. Aralarında hareket etmenin tek yolu, yer çekimi karşıtı nakliye tabakalarını kullanmak.
